label: Clay
description: Data enrichment and waterfall platform for outbound sales — enrich leads, build prospect lists, and automate data workflows.

form.title: Connect Clay
form.subtitle: Paste your Clay API key to let Anton read and enrich data from your Clay workspace.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from your Clay Workspace settings. The simplest and fastest way to connect — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect Clay with an API Key

### Steps

1. Log in to [Clay](https://app.clay.com).
2. Click your workspace name or avatar in the top-left corner to open workspace settings.
3. Navigate to **Settings → API Keys**.
4. Click **Create API Key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and confirm.
5. Copy the generated key — it is shown once, so save it somewhere safe.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- API keys are scoped to your workspace. Anyone with the key can act on behalf of your workspace — treat it like a password.
- If you lose the key, generate a new one from the same **Settings → API Keys** page and update it in Anton.
- Clay does not currently offer fine-grained key scopes; the key grants full API access to the workspace.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Clay → Settings → API Keys. Shown only once at creation time.

fields.name: workspace_name
fields.label: Workspace Name
fields.description: Optional. Your Clay workspace name or slug, used to disambiguate if you belong to multiple workspaces.
